title: B2C Premium — Study Materials & Tools
content:
Overview


The Study Materials page provides Premium users with free reference tools to support their learning. It includes a Scientific Calculator, five Formula Sheets, and a Unit Converter. All tools are available as part of the Premium subscription.



Scientific Calculator


A full-featured calculator with basic and scientific functions:


  • Basic operations: Addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, percentage
  • Scientific functions: Sine (sin), cosine (cos), tangent (tan), square root (√), powers (x^y), logarithms (log, ln)
  • Constants: Pi (π)
  • Parentheses: For grouping expressions
  • Clear and backspace: C clears everything, ⌫ removes the last character

The calculator follows standard order of operations and evaluates the full expression when equals (=) is pressed.



Formula Sheets


Five reference sheets are available:


Geometry Formulas: 2D shapes (square, rectangle, triangle, circle, parallelogram, rhombus, trapezium, kite), 3D shapes (cube, cuboid, sphere, cylinder, cone, pyramid), and theorems (Pythagorean, Heron's formula, circle theorems).


Physics Formulas: Kinematics (suvat equations), dynamics (Newton's laws, momentum, impulse, centripetal force), energy (kinetic, potential, power, work), electricity (Ohm's law, power, Coulomb's law, resistors, capacitance), heat, and waves.


Chemistry Formulas: Stoichiometry (moles, molarity, dilution, yield), gas laws (ideal gas, Boyle's, Charles's, Avogadro's), thermochemistry (enthalpy, Hess's law, calorimetry), acids and bases (pH, pOH, dissociation constants), and kinetics (rate law, Arrhenius equation).


Algebra Formulas: Quadratic equations (formula, discriminant, sum and product of roots), exponents and logarithms, sequences and series (arithmetic, geometric), algebraic identities (square and cube expansions), and functions (composition, inverse, distance formula).


Each formula sheet is organized into clearly labeled categories with a back button to return to the main tools grid.



Unit Converter


Converts between units in four categories:


  • Length: Millimeters, centimeters, meters, kilometers, inches, feet, yards, miles
  • Time: Seconds, minutes, hours, days, weeks, months (30 days), years (365 days)
  • Mass: Milligrams, grams, kilograms, ounces, pounds, tons
  • Temperature: Celsius, Fahrenheit, Kelvin

Enter a value, select source and target units, and click the exchange button to convert.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "All study tools are included with your Premium subscription."
  • "The calculator follows standard order of operations — use parentheses for complex expressions."
  • "Formula sheets are organized by subject and category. Click any card to open it."
  • "The unit converter handles length, time, mass, and temperature."
